allow: Bash(node -e "const { BrevoClient } = require\('@getbrevo/brevo'\); const c = new BrevoClient\({apiKey:'test'}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(c._options || {}\)\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(c\); console.log\('proto keys:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\)\)")
